mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_IDX, MEMBER_ID, PASSWORD, MEMBER_NAME, TO_CHAR(BIRTH, 'YYYY-MM-DD') BIRTH, EMAIL, PHONE_NUM, ADDRESS, ELITE, USE_HAND, HOPE_POSITION, MEMBER_REGDATE, IS_ADMIN FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = LOWER(#{member_id})

SELECT DISTINCT M.MEMBER_IDX MEMBER_IDX, M.MEMBER_ID MEMBER_ID, M.MEMBER_NAME MEMBER_NAME, TO_CHAR(M.BIRTH,'YYYY-MM-DD') BIRTH, M.EMAIL EMAIL, M.PHONE_NUM PHONE_NUM, M.ADDRESS ADDRESS, M.ELITE ELITE, M.USE_HAND USE_HAND, M.HOPE_POSITION HOPE_POSITION, M.MEMBER_REGDATE MEMBER_REGDATE, (SELECT T.TEAM_NAME FROM MEMBER_TEAM MT JOIN TEAM T ON MT.TEAM_IDX = T.TEAM_IDX WHERE T.TEAM_MANAGER = M.MEMBER_IDX AND ROWNUM = 1 OR MT.MEMBER_IDX = M.MEMBER_IDX AND MT.JOIN_STATUS = 1 AND ROWNUM = 1) JOIN_TEAM_NAME, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER_TEAM MT WHERE MT.MEMBER_IDX = M.MEMBER_IDX AND MT.JOIN_STATUS = 1) JOIN_TEAM_COUNT , (SELECT F.SFILE_NAME FROM FILES F WHERE F.MEMBER_IDX = M.MEMBER_IDX AND ROWNUM = 1) SFILE_NAME FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN MEMBER_TEAM MT ON M.MEMBER_IDX = MT.MEMBER_IDX LEFT JOIN TEAM T ON MT.TEAM_IDX = T.TEAM_IDX AND MT.JOIN_STATUS = 1
AND LOWER(M.MEMBER_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%'
AND LOWER(T.TEAM_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%'
ORDER BY M.MEMBER_IDX OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{numOfRows} ROWS ONLY

SELECT T.TEAM_IDX TEAM_IDX, T.TEAM_MANAGER TEAM_MANAGER, T.TEAM_NAME TEAM_NAME, T.TEAM_LOCATION TEAM_LOCATION, T.TEAM_REGDATE TEAM_REGDATE, MT.POSITION POSITION, MT.BACK_NUM BACK_NUM FROM MEMBER_TEAM MT JOIN TEAM T ON MT.TEAM_IDX = T.TEAM_IDX WHERE MT.MEMBER_IDX = #{member_idx} AND MT.JOIN_STATUS = 1 ORDER BY T.TEAM_IDX
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER ( MEMBER_IDX, MEMBER_ID, PASSWORD, MEMBER_NAME, BIRTH, EMAIL, PHONE_NUM, ADDRESS, ELITE, USE_HAND, HOPE_POSITION ) VALUES ( SEQ_MEMBER.NEXTVAL, LOWER(#{member_id}), #{password}, #{member_name}, TO_DATE(#{birth},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{email}, #{phone_num}, #{address}, #{elite}, #{use_hand}, #{hope_position} )
mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_IDX, MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_NAME, BIRTH, EMAIL, PHONE_NUM, ADDRESS, ELITE, USE_HAND, HOPE_POSITION, MEMBER_REGDATE FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = LOWER(#{member_id})
SELECT MEMBER_IDX, MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_NAME, BIRTH, EMAIL, PHONE_NUM, ADDRESS, ELITE, USE_HAND, HOPE_POSITION, MEMBER_REGDATE FROM MEMBER WHERE PHONE_NUM = #{phone_num}
SELECT MEMBER_IDX, MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_NAME, BIRTH, EMAIL, PHONE_NUM, ADDRESS, ELITE, USE_HAND, HOPE_POSITION, MEMBER_REGDATE FROM MEMBER WHERE EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET ADDRESS = #{address}, PHONE_NUM = #{phone_num}, MEMBER_NAME = #{member_name}, BIRTH = #{birth}, EMAIL = #{email}, USE_HAND = #{use_hand}, ELITE = #{elite}, HOPE_POSITION = #{hope_position} WHERE MEMBER_IDX = #{member_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_IDX, MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_NAME, ADDRESS, ELITE, USE_HAND, HOPE_POSITION FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_IDX = #{member_idx}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT M.MEMBER_IDX) FROM MEMBER M
LEFT JOIN MEMBER_TEAM MT ON M.MEMBER_IDX = MT.MEMBER_IDX AND MT.JOIN_STATUS = 1 LEFT JOIN TEAM T ON MT.TEAM_IDX = T.TEAM_IDX
AND LOWER(M.MEMBER_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%'
AND LOWER(T.TEAM_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT GR.GAME_IDX) AS "game_count", COUNT(*) AS "pa", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = '1B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "single_hit", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = '2B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "double_hit", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = '3B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "triple_hit", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = 'HR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "home_run", SUM(GR.GET_SCORE) AS "get_score", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = 'BB' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "bb_cnt", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = 'K' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "strike_out", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = 'SAC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "sac" FROM GAME_RESULT GR JOIN GAME G ON GR.GAME_IDX = G.GAME_IDX WHERE G.GAME_STATUS = 1 AND GR.HITTER_ID = #{member_id}
AND ( (GR.TOP_BOTTOM = 'T' AND G.AWAY_IDX = #{team_idx}) OR (GR.TOP_BOTTOM = 'B' AND G.HOME_IDX = #{team_idx}) )

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT GR.GAME_IDX) AS "game_count", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT != 'ETC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "hitter", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT IN ('1B','2B','3B','HR') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "hit_allowed", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = 'HR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "home_run_allowed", SUM(GR.GET_SCORE) AS "total_score", SUM(GR.ERA) AS "earned_run", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = 'SAC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "sac", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = 'BB' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "bb_cnt", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = 'K' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "strike_out", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = 'OUT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "out_count" FROM GAME_RESULT GR JOIN GAME G ON GR.GAME_IDX = G.GAME_IDX WHERE G.GAME_STATUS = 1 AND GR.PITCHER_ID = #{member_id}
AND ( (GR.TOP_BOTTOM = 'T' AND G.HOME_IDX = #{team_idx}) OR (GR.TOP_BOTTOM = 'B' AND G.AWAY_IDX = #{team_idx}) )

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN WIN_PITCHER = #{member_id} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "win", SUM(CASE WHEN LOSE_PITCHER = #{member_id} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "lose", SUM(CASE WHEN SAVE_PITCHER = #{member_id} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "save", SUM(CASE WHEN HOLD_PITCHER = #{member_id} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "hold" FROM GAME WHERE GAME_STATUS = 1
AND GAME_IDX IN ( SELECT DISTINCT GR.GAME_IDX FROM GAME_RESULT GR JOIN GAME G ON GR.GAME_IDX = G.GAME_IDX WHERE GR.PITCHER_ID = #{member_id} AND G.GAME_STATUS = 1 AND ( (GR.TOP_BOTTOM = 'T' AND G.HOME_IDX = #{team_idx}) OR (GR.TOP_BOTTOM = 'B' AND G.AWAY_IDX = #{team_idx}) ) )

SELECT DISTINCT M.MEMBER_IDX MEMBER_IDX, M.MEMBER_ID MEMBER_ID, M.MEMBER_NAME MEMBER_NAME, TO_CHAR(M.BIRTH,'YYYY-MM-DD') BIRTH, M.ELITE ELITE, M.MEMBER_REGDATE MEMBER_REGDATE, (SELECT T.TEAM_NAME FROM MEMBER_TEAM MT JOIN TEAM T ON MT.TEAM_IDX = T.TEAM_IDX WHERE T.TEAM_MANAGER = M.MEMBER_IDX AND ROWNUM = 1 OR MT.MEMBER_IDX = M.MEMBER_IDX AND MT.JOIN_STATUS = 1 AND ROWNUM = 1) JOIN_TEAM_NAME, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER_TEAM MT WHERE MT.MEMBER_IDX = M.MEMBER_IDX AND MT.JOIN_STATUS = 1) JOIN_TEAM_COUNT, (SELECT F.SFILE_NAME FROM FILES F WHERE F.MEMBER_IDX = M.MEMBER_IDX AND ROWNUM = 1) SFILE_NAME FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN MEMBER_TEAM MT ON M.MEMBER_IDX = MT.MEMBER_IDX LEFT JOIN TEAM T ON MT.TEAM_IDX = T.TEAM_IDX AND MT.JOIN_STATUS = 1 ORDER BY M.MEMBER_IDX

SELECT GR.HITTER_ID AS "member_id", COUNT(DISTINCT GR.GAME_IDX) AS "game_count", COUNT(*) AS "pa", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = '1B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "single_hit", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = '2B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "double_hit", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = '3B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "triple_hit", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = 'HR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "home_run", SUM(GR.GET_SCORE) AS "get_score", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = 'BB' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "bb_cnt", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = 'K' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "strike_out", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = 'SAC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "sac" FROM GAME_RESULT GR JOIN GAME G ON GR.GAME_IDX = G.GAME_IDX WHERE G.GAME_STATUS = 1 AND GR.HITTER_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY GR.HITTER_ID

SELECT GR.PITCHER_ID AS "member_id", COUNT(DISTINCT GR.GAME_IDX) AS "game_count", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT != 'ETC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "hitter", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT IN ('1B','2B','3B','HR') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "hit_allowed", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = 'HR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "home_run_allowed", SUM(GR.GET_SCORE) AS "total_score", SUM(GR.ERA) AS "earned_run", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = 'SAC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "sac", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = 'BB' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "bb_cnt", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = 'K' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "strike_out", SUM(CASE WHEN GR.RESULT = 'OUT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "out_count" FROM GAME_RESULT GR JOIN GAME G ON GR.GAME_IDX = G.GAME_IDX WHERE G.GAME_STATUS = 1 AND GR.PITCHER_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY GR.PITCHER_ID

SELECT PITCHER_ID AS "member_id", SUM(CASE WHEN ROLE = 'WIN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "win", SUM(CASE WHEN ROLE = 'LOSE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "lose", SUM(CASE WHEN ROLE = 'SAVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "save", SUM(CASE WHEN ROLE = 'HOLD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "hold" FROM ( SELECT WIN_PITCHER AS PITCHER_ID, 'WIN' AS ROLE FROM GAME WHERE GAME_STATUS = 1 AND WIN_PITCHER IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT LOSE_PITCHER AS PITCHER_ID, 'LOSE' AS ROLE FROM GAME WHERE GAME_STATUS = 1 AND LOSE_PITCHER IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT SAVE_PITCHER AS PITCHER_ID, 'SAVE' AS ROLE FROM GAME WHERE GAME_STATUS = 1 AND SAVE_PITCHER IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT HOLD_PITCHER AS PITCHER_ID, 'HOLD' AS ROLE FROM GAME WHERE GAME_STATUS = 1 AND HOLD_PITCHER IS NOT NULL ) GROUP BY PITCHER_ID
SELECT FILE_NUM AS "file_num", FILE_NAME AS "file_name", FILE_EXT AS "file_ext", SFILE_NAME AS "sfile_name" FROM FILES WHERE MEMBER_IDX = #{member_idx} AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FILES (FILE_NUM, MEMBER_IDX, FILE_NAME, FILE_EXT, SFILE_NAME) VALUES (SEQ_FILE.NEXTVAL, #{member_idx}, #{file_name}, #{file_ext}, #{sfile_name})
